title: Stage 03b — Executable Spec
description: G2 closed-loop contract: every numbered acceptance criterion (AC-N) in brief.md maps to one Gherkin Scenario in pipeline/spec.feature tagged @AC-N. The gate records the count + mapping. Drift between brief.md and spec.feature is structurally caught here; drift between spec.feature and tests is caught at stage-06. PASS requires all_criteria_mapped=true AND drift=false.

criteria_count.description: Number of numbered AC-N entries found in pipeline/brief.md. Zero means the brief is missing or unnumbered — surface as a blocker.

scenarios_count.description: Number of Scenario: / Scenario Outline: blocks parsed from pipeline/spec.feature.

criteria_to_scenario_mapping.description: Audit trail of which AC maps to which Scenario(s). Each entry: { criterion_id: 'AC-N', scenarios: [scenario_name, ...] }. An AC-N with an empty scenarios array indicates an orphan criterion (also reported in orphan_criteria for fast access).

all_criteria_mapped.description: True iff every AC-N in brief.md has at least one Scenario tagged @AC-N in spec.feature. Required for stage-03b PASS — false forces FAIL.

orphan_scenarios.description: Scenario names in spec.feature that don't reference an AC-N tag. Either tag them, remove them, or document why they're untagged. A non-empty list means drift.

orphan_criteria.description: AC-N entries in brief.md that have no Scenario in spec.feature. A non-empty list means drift — either add a scenario or remove the AC.

drift.description: True iff `devteam spec verify` found any of: orphan_criteria, orphan_scenarios, duplicate AC numbers in brief, unknown AC refs in tests. PASS requires drift=false.
